login.title: Sign in to Lolday
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.

train.title: Train — train a new model
train.description: Train a new model using the train dataset; the result is registered in the Models registry. Optional test dataset enables final metrics + confusion matrix computation.

evaluate.title: Evaluate — score with an existing model
evaluate.description: Run the test dataset through an existing trained model to compute metrics. No new model is registered.

predict.title: Predict — batch inference
predict.description: Run an existing model over an unlabeled dataset, producing predictions.csv. No metrics or ground truth required.

priority.label: Priority
priority.warning: Bumping priority pauses submission of new lower-priority jobs to Volcano until this job is dispatched. Running jobs are not affected.

help.test_dataset_optional: Optional. When provided, the run also computes final metrics and the confusion matrix. Skipping it only trains the model.
help.priority_admin: Priority jobs run before Normal jobs; among Priority jobs, oldest first. Running jobs are unaffected.
help.source_model: The trained model loaded for inference. Each model is bound to a detector; the Detector card below auto-fills from the chosen model.
help.model_version_retired: Training detector version has been retired. Retrain this model against a current detector version before running predict / evaluate.

stagesExplainer.title: About model stages
stagesExplainer.body: Newly registered model versions start in None. Use the Transition button on each version to promote: Staging for candidates under review, Production for the live serving version, Archived for retired versions. Mirrors the MLflow Model Registry lifecycle.

stages.stagingTooltip: Candidate version under validation. Promote here before production.
stages.productionTooltip: Currently the active version. Only one Production version per model at a time.

visibility.publicTooltip: Visible and usable by all authenticated users.
visibility.privateTooltip: Only you (owner) and admins can see or use this version.
visibility.warningPrivate: Other users will lose access for new predict jobs. Existing jobs continue running.
visibility.warningPublic: All authenticated users will be able to view and use this version.

description.title: Description
description.placeholder: Markdown supported. Document your model usage, training data, evaluation results...

tags.title: Tags
tags.schemaError: Tags must be a flat JSON object of string keys to string values

transfer.title: Transfer ownership
transfer.description: Move this model to another user. The new owner cannot already own a model for the same detector.
transfer.warning: Other users may lose write access. Existing predict jobs continue.

delete.title: Delete model
delete.warning: This action permanently deletes the model and all versions, including MLflow artefacts. This cannot be undone.

deleteVersion.title: Delete version
deleteVersion.warning: This will permanently delete version {{version}} of {{fullName}}.
